basic_details.job_title: IISER Kolkata Non Teaching Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Librarian, Executive Engineer Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Science Education and Research Kolkata
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Science Education and Research Kolkata (IISER Kolkata) has published the Non-Teaching Positions Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 9 Non-Teaching Positions. Candidates holding Master's Degree in Library Science/Information Science/Documentation Science, B.E./B.Tech in Civil Engineering, Master's Degree in relevant field, First Class Bachelor's Degree in Civil/Electrical Engineering, Master's Degree in Physical Education and Sports or Sports Science, or Diploma in Coaching are eligible to apply online at the official website. The application process is cur

application_fee.general_fee: Rs. 1000 (Rs. 950 application fee + Rs. 50 registration fee for SC/ST/PWD/Women/Ex-servicemen categories)

age_limit.age_details: Max age limit as per RCPP-2023. For Institute's employees, no upper age limit. Age relaxation as per Govt. of India norms.
age_limit.details: Maximum age limit as per RCPP-2023. For Institute's employees, no upper age limit. Age relaxation as per Govt. of India norms.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree in Library Science/Information Science/Documentation Science, B.E./B.Tech in Civil Engineering, Master's Degree in relevant field, First class Bachelor's degree in Civil/Electrical Engineering, Master's Degree in Physical Education and Sports or Sports Science, Diploma in coaching.
qualification.details: Librarian: Master's Degree in Library Science/Information Science/Documentation Science with at least 55% marks or an equivalent grade. Ph.D. Degree in library science/information science/documentation/archives and manuscript-keeping. Evidence of innovative library services, including ICT integration. At least 10 years as Dy. Librarian (Pay Level-12, including min 3 years in Pay Level-13A). Superintendent Engineer: B.E./B.Tech. in Civil Engineering with first class or equivalent Grade. At least 5 years regular service as Senior Executive Engineer in Pay Level-12 or equivalent or 10 years regular service as Executive Engineer in Pay Level-11 or equivalent. Deputy Librarian: Master's Degree in Library Science/Information Science/Documentation Science with at least 55% marks or an equivalent grade. Ph.D. Degree in library science/information science/documentation/archives and manuscript-keeping. Evidence of innovative library services, including ICT integration. At least 8 years as Assistant Librarian (Pay Level-10, with at least 2 years in Pay Level-11). Deputy Registrar: Master's Degree with at least 55% of the marks or equivalent grade. Five years administrative experience as Assistant Registrar in Pay Level-10 or equivalent post. Executive Engineer (Civil/Electrical): First class Bachelor's degree in Civil/Electrical Engineering. 10 years of experience at the level of Assistant Engineer or equivalent in Pay Level-7 or above; OR 5 years of experience as Assistant Executive Engineer or equivalent in Pay Level-10 or above. Assistant Registrar: Master's Degree with at least 55% of the marks or equivalent grade. Five years of experience in Pay Level-7 or above OR 7 years of experience at Pay Level-6 or above as Superintendent/Section Officer/Private Secretary or equivalent. Assistant Executive Engineer (Civil/Electrical): First class Bachelor's Degree in Civil/Electrical Engineering. 5 years of relevant experience in Pay Level-7 or above as Assistant Engineer. Sports Officer: Master's Degree in Physical Education and Sports or Sports Science with first class. Qualifying in the national level test conducted by UGC or approved agency, OR Diploma in coaching from National Institute of Sports or equivalent. Should qualify in the physical fitness test. 5 years of experience in a Central/State Educational Institutes/Organizations of repute. Demonstrated meritorious performance in National or International level events. Record of representing the university/college at inter-university/inter-collegiate competitions or State/national championships. Evidence of organizing competitions and conducting coaching camps. Deputy Registrar (on deputation): Master's Degree with at least 55% of the marks or equivalent grade. Five years administrative experience as Assistant Registrar in Pay Level-10 or equivalent post. Holding analogous posts (Level-12 post) on regular basis or officers working at Level-10 for at least 5 years on regular basis.

salary_details.pay_scale: Pay Level-14, Pay Level-13, Pay Level-12, Pay Level-11, Pay Level-10
salary_details.details: Librarian: Pay Level-14 Superintendent Engineer: Pay Level-13 Deputy Librarian: Pay Level-12 Deputy Registrar: Pay Level-12 Executive Engineer (Civil/Electrical): Pay Level-11 Assistant Registrar: Pay Level-10 Assistant Executive Engineer (Civil/Electrical): Pay Level-10 Sports Officer: Pay Level-10 Deputy Registrar (on deputation): Pay Level-12

selection_process: Screening of applications Written Test/Skill Test/Interview/Personal Discussion (if required)
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 06-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IISER Kolkata to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IISER Kolkata Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IISER Kolkata Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IISER Kolkata Job 2026 Notification PDF

Sports Officer: Master's Degree in Physical Education and Sports or Sports Science with first class. Qualifying in the national level test conducted by UGC or approved agency, OR Diploma in coaching from National Institute of Sports or equivalent. Should qualify in the physical fitness test. 5 years of experience in a Central/State Educational Institutes/Organizations of repute. Demonstrated meritorious performance in National or International level events. Record of representing the university/college at inter-university/inter-collegiate competitions or State/national championships. Evidence of organizing competitions and conducting coaching camps. Deputy Registrar (on deputation): Master's Degree with at least 55% of the marks or equivalent grade. Five years administrative experience as Assistant Registrar in Pay Level-10 or equivalent post. Holding analogous posts (Level-12 post) on regular basis or officers working at Level-10 for at least 5 years on regular basis.

content_sections.heading: IISER Kolkata Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Screening of applications Written Test/Skill Test/Interview/Personal Discussion (if required)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 06-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IISER Kolkata to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IISER Kolkata Non-Teaching Positions?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the IISER Kolkata Non-Teaching Positions is 06 July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Non-Teaching Positions at IISER Kolkata?
faq.answer: There are a total of 9 vacancies available for various Non-Teaching Positions at IISER Kolkata as per the latest recruitment notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for IISER Kolkata Non-Teaching Positions?
faq.answer: The application mode for IISER Kolkata Non-Teaching Positions is strictly online. Candidates need to visit the official recruitment portal to submit their applications.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for the Librarian post?
faq.answer: For the Librarian post, candidates must have a Master's Degree in Library Science/Information Science/Documentation Science with at least 55% marks, a Ph.D. Degree, and at least 10 years of experience as a Deputy Librarian.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided for SC/ST, OBC, PwBD, and other categories as per the Government of India norms. For Institute employees, there is no upper age limit.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for the recruited candidates?
faq.answer: The salary structure varies based on the post, ranging from Pay Level-10 to Pay Level-14 as per the 7th CPC Pay Matrix, along with applicable allowances.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves screening of applications, followed by a Written Test, Skill Test, Interview, or Personal Discussion, depending on the requirements of the post.

faq.question: Q8. How should I submit the hard copy of the application?
faq.answer: After submitting the online application, a printed/hard copy along with testimonials must reach The Dean (Administration), IISER Kolkata, Mohanpur, Nadia District, Pin – 741246, by 06 July 2026.

faq.question: Q9. What is the application fee for IISER Kolkata Non-Teaching Positions?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 1000 for General/OBC/EWS categories. For SC/ST/PWD/Women/Ex-servicemen categories, it is Rs. 950 (application fee) + Rs. 50 (registration fee).

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment.
